creator: dor.bsd@xm0.uk
text:
Created attachment 230713
net-mgmt/prometheus2: Update to 2.32.1

This patch updates net-mgmt/prometheus2 to v2.32.1, which includes multiple bugfixes.

Prometheus v2.31.x were skipped due to an issue in modules2tuple which prevented the generation of the GH_TUPLE list. This issue was reported upstream on GitHub.

Because v2.31.x was skipped, the changelog for this release is a little larger than usual. The changes can be viewed at: https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/blob/v2.32.1/CHANGELOG.md?plain=1#L1-L67

-David
